title: Remove parentheses and content from Metta and IFS titles in quiz score display

requirements.summary: Remove parenthetical text from Metta and IFS category titles in the quiz score h2 heading on KnowledgePage
acceptanceCriteria: The quiz score h2 heading displays 'Metta' without any parenthetical suffix.
The quiz score h2 heading displays 'IFS' without any parenthetical suffix.
No other category titles are altered.
The styled score badge and overall quiz score design remain unchanged.

file_operations.description: In the quiz score display section (identified by XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[3]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/h2[1]), modify the h2 element that renders the category title to strip parenthetical text for 'Metta (Loving-Kindness)' and 'IFS (Internal Family Systems)'. Create a helper function that removes text matching the pattern ' (...any text...)' from category titles. Apply this transformation only when rendering the quiz score heading, ensuring 'Metta (Loving-Kindness)' becomes 'Metta' and 'IFS (Internal Family Systems)' becomes 'IFS'. Do not modify any other instances of category title rendering (carousel, content viewer) or the underlying knowledgeContent.ts data.
